title: poponax tortuosa
intro: Poponax tortuosa, also known as prickly poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poponax tortuosa include relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as its use in treating respiratory problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in topical creams and ointments for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
